name: Personatech SaaS Platform
description: Helped set up and build Personatech's event-tech SaaS platform — 10+ enterprise clients, 1M+ one-on-one meetings, and $120M+ in additional client revenue since 2023. Also built Retail Meetup and Fintech Meetup (acquired by Hyve). React, Spring Boot, TypeScript, Playwright.

name: InstaReM Mobile
description: Cross-border payments mobile application for InstaReM (Nium), serving production fintech users on iOS and Android.
contribution: Built and maintained the InstaReM mobile application.

name: PhonePe Micro App
description: InstaReM integration micro app built for the PhonePe Switch platform, enabling in-app cross-border payment flows.

name: Smaken
description: Single page application where hobby chefs can sell their food to customers in the Netherlands.
contribution: Built the single page React application for hobby chefs marketplace.

name: IMMIDI
description: Digital marketing platform with a React web dashboard and React Native client apps for multiple brands.
contribution: UI development of web console; developed client applications in React Native for different brands.

name: Bluff Party — Card Game
description: 2D multiplayer card game for iOS and Android with real-time multiplayer backend.
contribution: Created game UI, gameplay, inventory system, card engine, and game tutorial.

name: Legendary Strike
description: 2D platformer arcade game optimized for iOS devices, published on the App Store.
contribution: Created game UI and gameplay; helped with performance optimization on mobile devices.

name: Poker Card Game
description: Browser-based 2D multiplayer poker card game with real-time server backend.
contribution: Created game UI and hand evaluation system.

name: Apcolite Runner
description: 2D platformer promotional game built in Flash for Asian Paints Apcolite campaign.
contribution: Created game UI, gameplay, and Facebook login integration.
